task_description: Phase 15: ML Recommendations - Create @quant/ml-runtime package with ONNX inference, feature store in ml-pipeline, full recommendation models (Two-Tower, collaborative, trending, MMoE, anti-rage, DPP diversity, on-device ranker), A/B testing framework, and Python training scripts.

verification.summary: 1369 tests pass (26 pre-existing shared-ui failures unrelated). All acceptance criteria verified. Semantic review APPROVED after v2 with only 2 non-blocking minor issues remaining.
